name: iAppy Chatbot
description: iAppy is a production-grade AI chatbot platform built at Isteer Technology. It orchestrates multiple LLM providers — Azure OpenAI, ChatGPT, and Gemini — through a unified Model Context Protocol (MCP) layer, enabling seamless cross-platform AI operations with intelligent routing.
highlights: Designed and integrated MCP tools enabling seamless communication across Azure OpenAI, ChatGPT, and Gemini
Engineered production-grade prompt templates and LLM optimization strategies improving agent consistency and response quality
Implemented AI agent architectures with orchestration and validation layers for context-aware routing and tool selection
Built RESTful APIs for AI-generated content with Redis caching for session management and high-frequency data
Optimized async HTTPX clients with connection pooling for reduced latency under production load

name: iStreet
description: iStreet is a full-featured algorithmic trading and investment advisory platform built for SEBI-regulated financial operations. It handles automated trade strategy execution, real-time market data streaming, and comprehensive client-facing investment workflows.
highlights: Built algo trading and investment advisory platforms using Python, Django, and DRF enabling automated trade strategies
Implemented SEBI-regulated fintech workflows including advisor/analyst onboarding and secure RBAC + JWT authentication
Designed RESTful APIs and optimized MySQL performance for high-volume financial and market-driven data processing
Implemented real-time trading data pipelines using WebSockets and async third-party API integrations (market data, brokers, payments)
Built automation pipelines using Celery and APScheduler for strategy execution, portfolio updates, and reporting
Ensured production reliability through PyTest-based testing, structured logging, and root-cause analysis during live market operations

name: RAG Drive Assistant
description: RAG Drive Assistant is an intelligent document querying system that lets users ask natural language questions over their own files. Built with a full RAG pipeline — document ingestion, vector embedding, semantic retrieval, and LLM-powered answer generation — it delivers accurate, grounded responses with source attribution.
highlights: Built end-to-end RAG pipeline covering document ingestion, chunking, vector embedding, and semantic retrieval
Integrated vector database for fast similarity search across large document corpora
Engineered LLM prompt chains for accurate, context-grounded answer generation with source attribution
Designed async FastAPI backend for concurrent document processing and query handling
Implemented support for multiple document formats with intelligent chunking strategies

name: iAmAIPlus
description: iAmAIPlus is a full-stack Django-powered coding school platform designed to onboard and teach programming to the next generation. It provides structured curriculum delivery, student progress tracking, and an interactive learning environment — built with scalability in mind for future AI-assisted tutoring.
highlights: Built full-stack Django application with comprehensive student onboarding and authentication system
Designed relational database schema for curriculum management, student progress, and course tracking
Implemented role-based access for admins, instructors, and students with tailored dashboards
Created responsive frontend with Bootstrap for cross-device compatibility
Architected the platform for future integration of AI-assisted tutoring and automated code assessment
